free_text: Measurement and calculation of radioactivities of
spallation products by high-energy heavy ions
Front sample cross sections as well as excitation
Main reference. See also TITLE and AUTHOR.
- Chemical-form of target is element. Chemical
Samples put on the front of surface were used
for measurements of the reaction cross section
and the mass-yield distributions or produced
nuclides, while samples inserted between the Cu
plates were used for measurements of the
spatial distribution of the residual activities
of produced nuclides in copper and of the
energy dependence of the cross section.
To measure gamma-ray spectra from samples
